title: AI for HR Launchpad
text:
Welcome to your

# AI for HR Launchpad

**Lead the charge in the AI era by learning how AI is transforming HR**

The AI for HR Launchpad is your starting point for making sense of how AI is changing the HR function.

Whether you’re exploring what’s possible or looking to get hands-on, this is where HR professionals and teams come to learn what matters, with resources, practical use cases, and curated content updated weekly.

Start Your AI JourneyStart upskilling

Articles Downloads Webinars AI Use Cases Newsletter Training

## This is your AI Moment 🚀

AI isn’t hype. It’s not a trend. It’s a fundamental shift, reshaping how work gets done and businesses compete. And it’s moving faster than any technology before it, transforming every role, every team, every function.

Since 2016, we have equipped over 85,000 HR professionals and 1,500 HR Teams with the skills that define modern HR. Now, we’re going all in on AI. Because the future of HR demands it.

About AIHR

**Whether you’re:**

* an HR professional ready to future-proof your career by learning and leveraging AI skills in your role
* a manager looking to boost productivity and impact by upskilling your entire HR team
* or an HR Leader navigating the AI transformation of your function

**AIHR is your partner in this new era.**

The moment is here. The opportunity is real. And it won’t wait. **This is your AI moment!**

## Activate your free AI Launchpad membership

The world of AI in HR is evolving by the week. New tools, bold experiments, surprising results, and even bigger opportunities.

Cut through all the vendor noise trying to hijack your AI journey with our free AI for HR Launchpad membership, bringing you:

Real-world success stories from leading HR teams

The latest breakthroughs and trends in AI for HR

Curated tools, articles, and AI use cases for HR

Tips for applying AI in your role or organization

No fluff. No vendor spam.

Just the curated insights you need to stay relevant and lead with confidence

Don’t miss the next big thing!Are you ready to take the next step? Accelerate your pace of learning with our upskilling solutions for individuals, teams, or HR leaders.

## Everything you need to kickstart your AI journey in HR

### Curated, Current, and Vendor-Agnostic

* Curated content to help you understand, apply, and lead with AI in HR, from strategy to daily tasks.
* Relevant insights and actionable resources to help you understand how AI is transforming HR, from big-picture strategy to everyday execution.
* No fluff & vendor-agnostic. Just practical, insightful content to get you going with confidence.

## AI for HR Use-Case Library

AI in HR isn’t just possible, it’s already happening. In this library, we are collecting real-world, use cases that show examples of how AI can improve speed, quality, and strategic impact across the HR function.

All Business PartneringHR AdminHR AnalyticsLeadershipTalent Acquisition

Manager Coaching Plan: Delegation Create a structured, actionable coaching plan on improving delegation skills. Learn more Difficult Conversation Prep Prepare an intentional and thoughtful talking track to safeguard a succesful outcome. Learn more Meeting Agenda Prepare a meeting agenda to ensure a structured and efficient use of time. Learn more Qualitative Engagement Data Analysis Analyze and cluster open-ended comments from employee engagement surveys Learn more Interview Questions Generate interview questions from a vacancy that you submit Learn more Interview Process Structure Ensure a structured interview process by using AI to generate an interview structure. ## AIHR: Your Partner in the AI Era

Since 2016, AIHR has helped +55,000 HR professionals and 1,500 HR teams build the capabilities that define modern, strategic HR, ranging from HR analytics and digital HR to business acumen and now, AI.

As the world of work enters a new era, we’re again all-in on supporting HR’s evolution, practically, ethically, and fearlessly. Here's what sets us apart:

Built for HR, not for Tech peopleWe speak HR because we are HR. Every piece of content we create, free or paid, is designed with the realities of HR professionals in mind. No fluff, no coding background required, just relevant insights and learning that fits your context. Global footprintBased in Europe, the US as our biggest market, and having clients in **+200 countries,** we are a truly global community of HR Professionals navigating the same shift. Real-time and real-worldAI in HR is only valuable if you know how to apply it. That’s why we focus on real-world, and domain-specific insights, from HR strategy, to L&D to Business Partnering. Publishing new content every day to keep up with the pace of innovation.

Vendor-neutral & objectiveWe’re not selling or promoting AI tools. Our perspective is grounded, critical, and focused on helping HR shape its own AI journey by making smart and impactful decisions. Because AI tools are not going to make the difference, well-informed and equipped people using them will.

4.66/5 A proven track record of impact based on 12470 ratings
